session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8513 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the specified PR argument.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-01 12:35:29 PT

Found 2 violations across 2 files. 1 inline comment posted. 1 pre-existing violation noted below (cannot attach inline comment to unchanged line).

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
❌ Verbatim source code copy — Found in `docs/learned/planning/learn-session-embedding.md:17`
⚠️ Verbatim source code copy (pre-existing, unchanged line) — Found in `docs/learned/cli/land-learn-integration.md:66`
✅ Inaccurate claims — None found in current content
✅ Drift risk (line numbers in prose) — None found in new content

### Violations Summary
- `docs/learned/planning/learn-session-embedding.md:17`: Partial excerpt `sorted(session_xml_dir.glob("*.xml"))` copied from `plan_save.py:230`. Replace with prose description + source pointer.
- `docs/learned/cli/land-learn-integration.md:66` (pre-existing): Verbatim try/except block from `land_learn.py:188-191`. The surrounding prose already describes the fire-and-forget behavior — the code block is redundant and will go stale.

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/architecture/index.md`: 0 violations (index-only change)
- `docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md`: 0 violations — new section follows correct patterns; CLI invocation example at line 137 is an allowed exception
- `docs/learned/cli/land-learn-integration.md`: 1 pre-existing violation (verbatim try/except at line 66)
- `docs/learned/planning/index.md`: 0 violations (index-only change)
- `docs/learned/planning/learn-session-embedding.md`: 1 violation (partial code excerpt at line 17)
- `docs/learned/tui/index.md`: 0 violations (index-only change)
- `docs/learned/tui/one-shot-prompt-modal.md`: 0 violations — design decision sections are high-value; CLI invocation example is an allowed exception
- `docs/learned/tui/stacked-pr-indicator.md`: 0 violations — data flow diagram is conceptual; stale-data rationale is high-value

### Verdict Summary
| File | Verdict | Issues |
|------|---------|--------|
| `docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md` | KEEP | 0 |
| `docs/learned/cli/land-learn-integration.md` | SIMPLIFY | 1 verbatim (pre-existing) |
| `docs/learned/planning/learn-session-embedding.md` | SIMPLIFY | 1 verbatim |
| `docs/learned/tui/one-shot-prompt-modal.md` | KEEP | 0 |
| `docs/learned/tui/stacked-pr-indicator.md` | KEEP | 0 |

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-01 12:35:29 PT**: Found 2 violations (1 new verbatim partial excerpt in learn-session-embedding.md:17; 1 pre-existing verbatim try/except in land-learn-integration.md:66). 1 inline comment posted, 1 noted in summary only.

</details>", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8513#issuecomment-3978723660" }, { "id": 3980819868, "author": "github-actions[bot]", "body": "<!-- erk:pr-address-run -->
## PR Review Comments Addressed

This PR was updated by an automated process triggered by:
```
erk pr address-remote 8513
```

### What is this?

[Erk](https://github.com/schrockn/erk) is a CLI tool for plan-oriented agentic
engineering. The `pr-address` workflow uses Claude to read PR review comments
and address them automatically.

### Changes Made

The PR review comments corrected inaccurate source code pointers in documentation files:

- **inference-hoisting.md**: Replaced overly specific line number references (e.g., "line 501-505") with more general descriptions of where Click options are defined, since line numbers become outdated as code changes.
- **land-learn-integration.md**: Updated function location from an incorrect path (`src/erk/tui/app.py:64-73`) to the actual function location (`src/erk/tui/operations/logic.py`), and added a second source pointer for the related `_land_pr_async` function.
- **one-shot-prompt-modal.md**: Corrected the source reference from an outdated file location and line numbers to the actual function location (`src/erk/tui/actions/palette.py, action_one_shot_prompt`).

These changes ensure documentation accurately reflects where code is actually located, improving maintainability as the codebase evolves.

### Details

- **Model:** claude-opus-4-6
- **Workflow run:** [View details](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/actions/runs/22551934714)
- **Commits added:** 1

---
*Automated by erk pr-address workflow*", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8513#issuecomment-3980819868"

## Summary
PR #8513 has **no unresolved review threads** and **no actionable discussion comments**. All 6 discussion comments are **informational** in nature:
1. **Plan Queued for Implementation** (schrockn) - Metadata comment about plan submission 2. **GitHub Action Started** (github-actions[bot]) - Workflow initialization status 3. **Audit PR Docs** (github-actions[bot]) - Audit results and violation reporting 4. **PR Review Comments Addressed** (github-actions[bot]) - Automation notification of addressed comments 5. **Remote rebase completed** (github-actions[bot]) - Rebase status notification 6. **Both violations addressed** (github-actions[bot]) - Follow-up on violation resolution
All violations mentioned in the audit have been addressed by automated processes (commits referenced in the final comment: 8f2cc78 and 73d905c). The PR is ready for landing with no outstanding actionable feedback.
